positive: A whimsical and stylized arrangement of abstract celestial bodies: crescent moons, nebula swirls, constellations formed by glowing dotted lines, and stylized planets orbiting a central point. The overall composition should evoke a sense of deep space mystery and gentle magic. Use a palette of deep sapphire blues, cosmic violets, luminous teal, and bright silver highlights. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern minimalist scientific illustration, emphasizing clean, flowing silhouettes and strong contrast between the luminous elements and the dark background. The design must be centered, highly scalable for apparel printing, and maintain clear, distinct visual boundaries between elements. Perfect for a seamless, high-contrast textile print.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, grain, artifacts, multiple subjects, extra limbs, poor anatomy, low resolution, ugly, messy, jpeg artifacts
